description: The Modular Ocean Module (MOM) version 1 simulates several tracers (T,S,age) and velocities on a static depth based grid. It uses a rigid lid assumption to damp sound waves. There is a relaxation solver to compute the barotropic and baroclinic velocity components. A sea ice model is embedded in the code. This is a close relative to the Bryan-Cox model developed in the 1970's at GFDL.
references: 1991: The GFDL Modular Ocean Model User Guide
Version 1.0. GFDL Ocean Group Technical Report No. 2
